name: Strawberry-Banana Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package prepared 9-inch graham cracker crumb crust, cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange banana slices in the bottom of the crust.
2. Completely dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
3. Combine cold water and ice cubes to make 1 ¼ cups.
4. Add the mixture from step 3 to the gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened.
5. Remove any unmelted ice.
6. Using a wire whisk, blend in the whipped topping; then whip until smooth.
7. Fold in strawberries.
8. Chill until the mixture mounds.
9. Spoon over banana slices in the pie crust.
10. Chill for about 2 hours. Garnish with additional strawberries and banana slices, if desired.
